analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e class feature naming and structure. This feature represents the core choice for the Warlock class.
analysis.quality: High quality. It accurately describes the foundational feature of the Warlock class, establishing the source of power and the level progression for subclass features.

mechanics.notes: This feature itself is the prerequisite for the Warlock's subclass (Patron) features. It defines the initial choice and the subsequent feature level progression (1st, 6th, 10th, 14th).
